title: does Rei hate Asuka or is it just Asuka hates Rei
display_title: does Rei hate Asuka or is it just Asuka hates Rei
wikitext:
[]: does Rei hate Asuka or is it just Asuka hates Rei?             Quote Post by risu » Fri Jan 12, 2007 11:21 pm or does Rei not know what hate is since she dosn't know what other emotions are through the beginning of the series.

[]: Re: does Rei hate Asuka or is it just Asuka hates Rei?             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jan 12, 2007 11:41 pm risu wrote: or does Rei not know what hate is since she dosn't know what other emotions are through the beginning of the series.

[]: Re: does Rei hate Asuka or is it just Asuka hates Rei?             Quote Post by risu » Fri Jan 12, 2007 11:45 pm Ornette wrote: risu wrote: or does Rei not know what hate is since she dosn't know what other emotions are through the beginning of the series.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jan 12, 2007 11:57 pm Rei doesn't hate anyone. Asuka hates everyone, herself the most. If you watched the show, you would know that.

[]:             Quote Post by ThroneofDravaris » Sat Jan 13, 2007 1:13 am Rei I doesn't seem to like Gendo/Ritsuko very much. That's all I can think of.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Jan 13, 2007 7:38 am Rei doesn't even know hot to hate someone, therefore it's pretty difficult for her. I wouldn't say "hate", it seems more like "don't care". On the other hand, about Asuka, well watch epi 22 and you'll get the idea!

[]:             Quote Post by risu » Sat Jan 13, 2007 6:08 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Rei doesn't hate anyone. Asuka hates everyone, herself the most. If you watched the show, you would know that.

[]:             Quote Post by Ejinathan » Sat Jan 13, 2007 7:28 pm Its stil weird Asuka knows she hates herself..... ever seen somebody at age of 14 saying: i hate myself the most!

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Sat Jan 13, 2007 9:01 pm Ever see someone graduate from college at the age of 14?

[]:             Quote Post by Nukie » Sat Jan 13, 2007 10:12 pm the_seventh_child wrote: Rei doesn't even know hot to hate someone, therefore it's pretty difficult for her. I wouldn't say "hate", it seems more like "don't care".

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 13, 2007 11:38 pm Nukie wrote: When Rei sports the Longinus in ep 22, she clearly has an expression of hatred on her face.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Jan 14, 2007 12:05 am She was ready to bitch-slap Asuka in 16. Too bad Misato interupted them would have been funny.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jan 14, 2007 12:09 am Rei doesn't have emotions so much as she has stark or vague facsimiles of emotions that serve to act as crucial plot devices.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jan 14, 2007 12:15 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Rei doesn't have emotions so much as she has stark or vague facsimiles of emotions that serve to act as crucial plot devices.

[]: ^_^ \/,,             Quote Post by chiefen » Sun Jan 14, 2007 10:07 am Well, she did slap Shinji. Or was that the Yui part? *dunn dunn dunn*

[]: Re: ^_^ \/,,             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Jan 14, 2007 10:30 am chiefen wrote: Well, she did slap Shinji. Or was that the Yui part? *dunn dunn dunn*

[]: Re: ^_^ \/,,             Quote Post by cat42 » Sun Jan 14, 2007 10:56 am Ornette wrote: ...getting irritated or pissed off != hate...

[]: Re: ^_^ \/,,             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Jan 14, 2007 10:58 am chiefen wrote: Well, she did slap Shinji. Or was that the Yui part? *dunn dunn dunn*

[]: Re: ^_^ \/,,             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Jan 14, 2007 11:13 am cat42 wrote: Ornette wrote: ...getting irritated or pissed off != hate...

[]:             Quote Post by brainDamage » Sun Jan 14, 2007 6:36 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Rei doesn't have emotions so much as she has stark or vague facsimiles of emotions that serve to act as crucial plot devices.
